roles.title: Software Engineer & Team Captain
roles.description: Leading a team of engineers as Team Captain while continuing hands-on development. Responsible for team coordination, technical decision-making, and ensuring delivery quality across the sprint cycle.

roles.title: Software Engineer & Agile Advocate
roles.description: Championed agile practices across the engineering organisation, facilitating retrospectives, improving workflows, and promoting a culture of continuous improvement alongside regular feature development.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Joined Dynatrace as a software engineer, contributing to feature development and integrating with existing platform services.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Developed and maintained web hosting platform features, working across frontend and backend systems to improve customer-facing products and internal tooling.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Senior full-stack engineer at the founding of this legal tech startup. Built and shaped the core platform enabling users to manage dynamically created contracts - from employment to real estate - including KYC workflows and multi-stakeholder processes. Drove fundamental architecture decisions and mentored junior developers.
